creator: stas@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi!

Why do you thinks that you can't link with mips-rtems-gcc?
This warning is a normal situation, since you really have no
a _start symbol. You're receiveing it automatically only
when compilling under a complete OS that can load executables
dynamically. If you will try to build a project for rtems
it'll be ok, since rtems already contains _start entry symbol.

-- 
Stanislav Sedov
ST4096-RIPE
